name: @nube/insights
description: Reusable, transport-agnostic insights machinery for React — the Lazybones 'triage findings raised by rules, flows, and agents' surface, extracted so any host (the dashboard page, an extension UI, a dashboard widget) reuses ONE implementation. Headless model + hooks + an OPTIONAL self-themed UI (read-only + acknowledge/dismiss widgets); the host injects how to reach the node (an InsightsClient) and may bring its own look.
